scripts.test: pnpm --filter @tsqlx/core test && pnpm --filter @tsqlx/codegen test && pnpm --filter @tsqlx/cli test && pnpm --filter @tsqlx/language-server test && pnpm --filter @tsqlx/vite test
scripts.test:playground: pnpm --filter @tsqlx/playground run build && pnpm --filter @tsqlx/playground run test:e2e
